Oracle Supports White House's Vision for Healthcare Data Interoperability Oracle today pledged support for the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services' Digital Health Ecosystem and Interoperability Framework. Winners in Second Annual Stevie® Awards for Technology Excellence Announced Winners in the 2025 (second annual) Stevie® Awards for Technology Excellence were announced today. The awards celebrate the remarkable accomplishments of individuals, teams, and organizations shaping the future of technology across all industry sectors. Individuals and organizations worldwide are eligible to enter - public and private, for-profit and non-profit, large and small.
